about.persona: Fullstack Developer, Web Developer, Software developer, cybersecurity researcher, AI systems builder, and automation-focused engineer.
about.full_description:
I am a highly versatile fullstack developer, web developer, software developer, cybersecurity researcher, and advanced systems builder driven by an intensely curious mind and a philosophy of high-leverage efficiency. I proudly define myself as a 'lazy' engineer in the best sense of the word—I reject brute-force manual labor and mundane repetition, choosing instead to deploy innovative architecture, automation scripts, and local AI workflows to get complex tasks done creatively and effortlessly.

My work combines systems programming, cybersecurity, AI orchestration, computer vision, local LLM tooling, and automation engineering. I specialize in privacy-focused, local-first systems using Python, Rust, Linux environments, CLI agents, and AI-assisted workflows.

design_preferences.animation_style: Apple-style smoothness with advanced interactions and cinematic transitions

projects.description: Forensic-grade biometric identity verification system built with Python, InsightFace, and MediaPipe for advanced facial recognition and geometry tracking.

projects.name: Deepfake-Analyzer
projects.description: Offline privacy-first deepfake detection workbench using Rust and Python hybrid architecture.

projects.name: Hardware-Driven Network & Motion Sensing Node
projects.description: Raspberry Pi and Ralink 3070-based sensing and packet monitoring node for low-level network analysis.

projects.name: Cafe Billing System
projects.description: Operational billing and reporting application for local service operations.
